last_result.message: Fresh restart is destructive. For route repair, prefer checkpoint rewind.

options.label: Continue current branch
options.effect_if_selected: This keeps working from the current proof state.

options.label: Undo last committed tactic
options.effect_if_selected: This will undo the last committed tactic in this node.

options.label: Show rewind choices
options.effect_if_selected: This will show committed tactics you can rewind before.

options.label: Erase branch and restart
options.effect_if_selected: This will erase all committed tactics in this node and restart from the target lemma.

lines: result_L = result_R /\ A_L = A_R /\ qs_L = qs_R /\ fdom m_L = qs_L) =>

source.label: Parsed from EasyCrypt pretty goal text

surface_profile.name: l1_goal_projection
surface_profile.description: L1 Goal-State Projection: manager transport of ONLY the current goal. No status, no manager-result section, no focus — the agent sees the raw goal and nothing else (the node-memory recovery anchor and the one-line submit-intent reminder are the only scaffolding).
